# Licensing and Tiers excerpt

Source URL: https://github.com/snakers4/silero-models/wiki/Licensing-and-Tiers
Captured at UTC: 2026-05-25T03:04:44Z
Retrieval method: web page text extraction from the public GitHub wiki page
Content type: extracted text from HTML

Relevant summary

- The wiki page splits the offering into Community Edition and Enterprise Edition.
- The Community Edition is described as non-commercial.
- The page says the CE tier comes with no commercial support, feature requests, or liability implied.
- The Enterprise Edition is described as the path for higher quality, support, model adaptation, and custom features.

Notes

This snapshot captures the commercial-risk signal only. It is not legal advice.
